items.summary: Generate a new CSV dataset file at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv containing approximately 500 employee records with columns: employee_id (text), name (text), email (text), phone (text), department (text), designation (text), date_of_joining (DD-MM-YYYY format), salary (number), location (text), status (Active/Inactive). Include variety across departments (HR, Finance, IT, Operations, Marketing, Sales), multiple designations (Manager, Senior Executive, Executive, Team Lead), various locations (Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune), mix of Active/Inactive status, salaries ranging from 25000 to 150000, and joining dates between 2018 and 2024.

Update backend data model in backend/main.mo to support employee registry with fields: employee_id (Text), name (Text), email (Text), phone (Text), department (Text), designation (Text), date_of_joining (Text for DD-MM-YYYY format), salary (Nat), location (Text), status (Text for Active/Inactive). Replace or extend existing CitizenRecord type to accommodate employee data structure.

Update transaction processing interface in frontend/src/components/TransactionForm.tsx to work with employee records instead of citizen records. Replace Citizen_ID input with employee_id input, update scheme selection to reflect employee-relevant schemes or benefits (e.g., Salary Advance, Medical Reimbursement, Travel Allowance), and adjust validation logic to check employee eligibility based on department, designation, status, and other employee-specific criteria.

Update Gate 1: Eligibility Gate validation logic to check that employee_id exists in employee registry, status equals Active, department and designation match eligibility criteria for requested benefit scheme, and salary falls within appropriate range for the benefit type.

Update transaction history display in frontend/src/components/TransactionHistory.tsx to show employee-specific transaction details including employee_id, employee name, department, designation, benefit type, amount, approval/rejection status, and timestamp.

Update application branding and labels throughout the UI to reflect employee benefit processing instead of citizen benefit processing. Change 'Jan-Dhan Gateway' header to 'Employee Benefits Gateway', update form labels to use employee terminology, and adjust all user-facing text to reflect the employee benefits context.
